title: aloysia ligustrina var. schulziae
intro: Aloysia ligustrina var. schulziae, also known as Brazilian tea tree, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. These properties have been associated with several health benefits, including the treatment of sore throats, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. Aloysia ligustrina var. schulziae can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
